'''âv-g-p-p''' ('''kavagpepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tief|tief]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-g-p-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tief|tief]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-g-p-p
|-
! Lemma
| kavagpepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivagpepoko|thivagpepoko]] || [[word:jivagpepoko|jivagpepoko]] || [[word:shivagpepoko|shivagpepoko]] || [[word:kivagpepoko|kivagpepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvagpepoko|thuthuvagpepoko]] || [[word:jujuvagpepoko|jujuvagpepoko]] || [[word:shushuvagpepoko|shushuvagpepoko]] || [[word:kukuvagpepoko|kukuvagpepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvagpepoko|thuvagpepoko]] || [[word:juvagpepoko|juvagpepoko]] || [[word:shuvagpepoko|shuvagpepoko]] || [[word:kuvagpepoko|kuvagpepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvagpepoko|thuvagpepoko]] || [[word:juvagpepoko|juvagpepoko]] || [[word:shuvagpepoko|shuvagpepoko]] || [[word:kuvagpepoko|kuvagpepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevagpepoko|thevagpepoko]] || [[word:jevagpepoko|jevagpepoko]] || [[word:shevagpepoko|shevagpepoko]] || [[word:kevagpepoko|kevagpepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovagpepoko|thothovagpepoko]] || [[word:jojovagpepoko|jojovagpepoko]] || [[word:shoshovagpepoko|shoshovagpepoko]] || [[word:kokovagpepoko|kokovagpepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovagpepoko|thovagpepoko]] || [[word:jovagpepoko|jovagpepoko]] || [[word:shovagpepoko|shovagpepoko]] || [[word:kovagpepoko|kovagpepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovagpepoko|thovagpepoko]] || [[word:jovagpepoko|jovagpepoko]] || [[word:shovagpepoko|shovagpepoko]] || [[word:kovagpepoko|kovagpepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvagpepoko|thĂŠvagpepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvagpepoko|jĂŠvagpepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvagpepoko|shĂŠvagpepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvagpepoko|kĂŠvagpepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavagpepoko|thathavagpepoko]] || [[word:jajavagpepoko|jajavagpepoko]] || [[word:shashavagpepoko|shashavagpepoko]] || [[word:kakavagpepoko|kakavagpepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavagpepoko|thavagpepoko]] || [[word:javagpepoko|javagpepoko]] || [[word:shavagpepoko|shavagpepoko]] || [[word:kavagpepoko|kavagpepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavagpepoko|thavagpepoko]] || [[word:javagpepoko|javagpepoko]] || [[word:shavagpepoko|shavagpepoko]] || [[word:kavagpepoko|kavagpepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavagpepithi|shavagpepithi]] || [[word:shavagpepiji|shavagpepiji]] || [[word:shavagpepishi|shavagpepishi]] || [[word:shavagpepiki|shavagpepiki]]
